docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY MURRELL JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT NORTHWEST AIRLINES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
INVALID SERVICE, PARTY SERVED NAMED SAME AS SERVER

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MURRELL JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORTHWEST AIRLINES $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,270.00, SETTLEMENT REACHED BY PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
